creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
I also see the same error on FreeBSD 14.0.

It seems the cause commit was https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=bbab7f59e9630416397189df70ec133bdd690e38 , which removed Sparc support.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/diff/devel/llvm15/Makefile?id=bbab7f59e9630416397189df70ec133bdd690e38
